meta.title: Contact ZoeSkoul
meta.description: Get in touch with ZoeSkoul for support, demos, partnerships, and general questions.

hero.title: Talk to the ZoeSkoul team
hero.description: Need support, want a demo, or interested in partnerships? Choose the fastest way to reach us below.

general.title: General inquiries
general.description: Questions about ZoeSkoul, onboarding, features, or how the platform works.

support.title: Support
support.description: Need help with login, access, billing, subscriptions, or technical issues?

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Prefer quick messaging? Start a WhatsApp conversation with our team.

demo.title: Book a demo
demo.description: Schedule a live walkthrough for your school, organization, or team.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Interested in collaboration, licensing, investment, or strategic partnership opportunities?

help.title: Help center
help.description: Browse platform guides, FAQs, and learning support resources.

quickHelp.title: Need something specific?
quickHelp.description: ZoeSkoul supports learners, educators, schools, and organizations that want to deliver training and self-learning experiences.

availability.title: Best ways to reach us
availability.description: Use the option that matches your need so we can respond faster.
items: For account and platform issues: Support
For meetings and walkthroughs: Book a demo
For collaboration or business opportunities: Partnerships
